Notes:

1. The green numbers on the right are from the lesson example that I showed you. This is where you'll paste in your own numbers from Facebook.
2. Any correlation above or below +/- 0.5 is considered statistically significant and we can confidently use this number to predict ROAS.
3. When the funnel metric are close to these funnel metric targets, keep the ad running whether or not the ROAS target is met.
